2605.20164.title: Not Every Rubric Teaches Equally: Policy-Aware Rubric Rewards for RLVR
2605.20164.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has made post-training highly effective when correctness can be checked automatically. However, many important model behaviors require satisfying several qualitative criteria at once. Rubric-based rewards address this setting by grading prompt-specific criteria and aggregating them into a scalar reward. Yet standard static aggregations conflate a criterion's human-assigned importance with its current usefulness as an optimization signal. We show that this assumption breaks down in rubric RL: many important criteria are already saturated or currently unreachable, while criteria that distinguish rollouts are not necessarily those with the largest human weights. We introduce POW3R, a policy-aware rubric reward framework that preserves human weights and category balance as the rubric objective while adapting criterion-level reward weights during training. POW3R uses rollout-level contrast to emphasize criteria that currently separate the policy's outputs, making the GRPO reward more informative without changing the underlying evaluation target. Across three base policies on two datasets spanning multimodal and text-only settings, POW3R wins $24$ of $30$ base-policy/metric comparisons, improving both mean rubric reward and strict completion (the fraction of prompts whose response satisfies every required rubric criterion) over vanilla GRPO with rubric rewards, and reaches the same plateau in $2.5$--$4\times$ fewer training steps. Rubric rewards should therefore distinguish what should matter in the final answer from what can teach the current policy.
2605.20164.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習與可驗證獎勵的結合使得後訓練在正確性可以自動檢查時變得非常有效。<lb/>然而，許多重要的模型行為需要同時滿足幾個質性標準。<lb/>基於評分標準的獎勵通過對特定提示標準進行評分並將其聚合成標量獎勵來解決這一情況。<lb/>然而，標準的靜態聚合將標準的人工指定重要性與其作為優化信號的當前有效性混為一談。<lb/>我們顯示這一假設在評分標準強化學習中失效：許多重要的標準已經飽和或當前無法達到，而區分回合的標準不一定是那些擁有最大人工權重的標準。<lb/>我們提出了POW3R，一個政策感知的評分標準獎勵框架，該框架在訓練過程中保留人工權重和類別平衡作為評分標準目標，同時調整標準級獎勵權重。<lb/>POW3R使用回合級對比來強調當前區分政策輸出的標準，使GRPO獎勵更具信息性而不改變基礎評估目標。<lb/>在兩個涵蓋多模態和僅文本設置的數據集上，對三個基礎政策進行的比較中，POW3R在30個基礎政策/指標比較中贏得了24個，並在均值評分獎勵和嚴格完成（滿足每個所需評分標準的提示響應的比例）上超過了傳統的GRPO與評分標準獎勵，並在2.5到4倍更少的訓練步驟中達到了相同的平臺。<lb/>因此，評分標準獎勵應該區分最終答案中應該重要的內容與能夠教導當前政策的內容。
2605.20164.author: Utkarsh Tyagi et.al.
2605.20164.authors: Utkarsh Tyagi, Xingang Guo, MohammadHossein Rezaei, Daniel George, Anas Mahmoud, Jackson Lee, Bing Liu, Yunzhong He
